languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

languages.text: {n}Тразин Неисчислимый погружается в короткое молчание.{/n} "Экспозиция, срежисированная мной, испорчена, а коллекция лишилась одного из экспонатов — и это после того, как я щедро наградил Себериана за его исключительность. Я лишаю династию фон Валанциус чести состоять в экспозиции Музеона. Забирай своего предка. Я буду присматривать замену".

I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

languages.text: {n}無限なるトラザインは短い沈黙に陥る。{/n}「私の演出は台無しになり、コレクションは展示品を失った。しかも、シベリアンの卓越した功績に対して、私は彼に大金を贈った。私はフォン・ヴァランキウス家の祖先を、ミュゼイオンの展示から外す。祖先を連れて行け。私は代わりの候補を探し出す。」
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The tasteful performance I put on is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

traits.locale_text: トラズン・ザ・インフィニットは短い沈黙に陥る。「私の演出は台無しになり、コレクションは展示品を失った。しかも、シベリアンの卓越した功績に対して、私は彼に大金を贈った。私はフォン・ヴァランキウス家の祖先を、ミュゼイオンの展示から外す。祖先を連れて行け。私は代わりの候補を探し出す。」

languages.text: {n}无限者特拉金陷入了短暂的沉默。{/n}“我曾慷慨奖励塞贝里安的卓越表现，换来的却是精心设计的展览被毁，还为此失去了一件展品。我在此剥夺冯·瓦兰修斯王朝成为大陈列馆一部分的殊荣。带上你的先祖走吧。我另去寻找一个替代品。”
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

traits.locale_text: {n}无限者特拉金陷入了短暂的沉默。{/n}“我曾慷慨奖励塞贝里安的卓越表现，换来的却是精心设计的展览被毁，还为此失去了一件展品。我在此剥夺冯·瓦兰修斯王朝成为大陈列馆一部分的殊荣。带上你的先祖走吧。我另去寻找一个替代品。”

languages.text: {n}Trazyn el Infinito se sume en un breve silencio.{/n} «La exposición que había diseñado está en ruinas, la colección ha perdido una de sus exhibiciones, y eso después de haber recompensado tan generosamente a Seberian por su excepcionalismo. Le retiro a la dinastía von Valancius el honor de formar parte de la exhibición del Museion. Llévate a tu antepasado. Buscaré un reemplazo».
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn el Infinito se sume en un breve silencio.{/n} «La exposición que había diseñado está en ruinas, la colección ha perdido una de sus exhibiciones, y eso después de haber recompensado tan generosamente a Seberian por su excepcionalismo. Le retiro a la dinastía von Valancius el honor de formar parte de la exhibición del Museion. Llévate a tu antepasado. Buscaré un reemplazo».

languages.text: {n}Trazyn der Unendliche schweigt einen Moment.{/n} "Meine Ausstellung ist ruiniert und die Sammlung hat eines ihrer Exponate verloren ... und das, nachdem ich Seberian für seine Einzigartigkeit so großzügig belohnt hatte. Ich entziehe der Dynastie derer von Valancius die Ehre, Teil der Ausstellung meines Museions zu sein. Nimm deinen Ahnherren mit. Ich werde mich nach einem Ersatz umsehen."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn der Unendliche schweigt einen Moment.{/n} "Meine Ausstellung ist ruiniert und die Sammlung hat eines ihrer Exponate verloren ... und das, nachdem ich Seberian für seine Einzigartigkeit so großzügig belohnt hatte. Ich entziehe der Dynastie derer von Valancius die Ehre, Teil der Ausstellung meines Museions zu sein. Nimm deinen Ahnherren mit. Ich werde mich nach einem Ersatz umsehen."

languages.text: {n}Trazyn l'Infini réfléchit un instant en silence avant de répondre.{/n} « Vous avez gâché l'exposition que j'avais préparée et ma collection a perdu l'une de ses pièces, tout cela après que j'ai si généreusement récompensé Seberian pour ses prouesses. J'ai donc décidé d'ôter à la dynastie von Valancius l'honneur de figurer parmi les trésors du Muséion. Emmenez votre ancêtre. Je lui trouverai un remplaçant. »
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn l'Infini réfléchit un instant en silence avant de répondre.{/n} « Vous avez gâché l'exposition que j'avais préparée et ma collection a perdu l'une de ses pièces, tout cela après que j'ai si généreusement récompensé Seberian pour ses prouesses. J'ai donc décidé d'ôter à la dynastie von Valancius l'honneur de figurer parmi les trésors du Muséion. Emmenez votre ancêtre. Je lui trouverai un remplaçant. »

languages.text: {n}Mutlak Trazyn, kısa bir sessizliğe bürünüyor.{/n} "Tasarladığım görüntü mahvoldu, koleksiyon da sergilerinden birini yitirdi. Hem de Seberian'ı istisnai durumu nedeniyle cömertçe ödüllendirdikten sonra. Von Valancius hanedanlığını Museion sergisinin bir parçası olma onurundan mahrum bırakıyorum. Atanızı alın. Yerine başkasını bulacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}Trazyn the Infinite lapses into a brief silence.{/n} "The display I designed is ruined, and the collection has lost one of its exhibits — and this after I lavishly rewarded Seberian for his exceptionalism. I am stripping the von Valancius dynasty of the honour of being part of the Museion exhibition. Take your ancestor. I will seek out a replacement."

Hem de Seberian'ı istisnai durumu nedeniyle cömertçe ödüllendirdikten sonra. Von Valancius hanedanlığını Museion sergisinin bir parçası olma onurundan mahrum bırakıyorum. Atanızı alın. Yerine başkasını bulacağım."
